hero.title: Build Connected Teams,
hero.subtitle: Flowkyn helps distributed teams strengthen bonds through curated activities, icebreakers, and wellness rituals — all from one platform.
hero.noCard: Free for teams up to 10 · No credit card required

problem.title: Remote Teams Are Struggling
problem.subtitle: Disengaged teams hurt productivity, culture, and retention.

symptoms.title: The Symptoms
items: Team building feels forced or awkward

problem.punchline: Current solutions fail: 3–5 hours searching online OR €500–2,000 facilitators

features.title: Everything You Need to
features.subtitle: From quick icebreakers to ongoing wellness rituals, Flowkyn provides a complete toolkit for team engagement.

activities.label: Activity Library
activities.title: 50+ Curated Activities Ready to Launch
activities.description: Choose from icebreakers, quizzes, coffee roulette, gratitude circles, and more. Each one designed and tested for remote teams with step-by-step instructions.

liveAsync.label: Flexible Modes
liveAsync.title: Live & Async — Works Across Every Time Zone
liveAsync.description: Run real-time activities with live polls and timers, or launch async rituals like 'Wins of the Week' that fit every schedule and time zone.

analytics.label: Insights
analytics.title: Measure Engagement, Prove ROI
analytics.description: Track participation rates, engagement trends, and activity effectiveness with detailed dashboards and exportable reports your leadership will love.

management.label: Event Management
management.title: Schedule, Invite, and Manage in One Place
management.description: Plan activities, send invitations, manage recurring events, and coordinate across multiple teams — all from a single intuitive dashboard.

howItWorks.title: Up and Running
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to transform your team culture.

step1.title: Create Your Workspace
step1.description: Sign up, invite your team, and configure your org settings. Takes less than 2 minutes.

step2.title: Choose an Activity
step2.description: Browse the activity library, filter by team size, duration, or type (live or async), and schedule it.

step3.title: Engage & Measure
step3.description: Your team participates, you track engagement over time and watch your culture metrics improve.

items.quote: Flowkyn transformed how our 120-person engineering org connects. Our engagement survey scores jumped 34% in just three months.
items.author: Sarah Chen

items.quote: We went from awkward forced fun to genuine team moments. The async activities are a game-changer for our global team.
items.author: Marcus Oliveira

items.quote: Finally, a platform that doesn't require a facilitator or a huge budget. Our managers love the self-serve approach.
items.author: Lena Hoffmann

items.question: Is Flowkyn really free?
items.answer: Yes! Flowkyn is free for teams up to 10 members. For larger teams, we offer affordable plans starting at €4/user/month.

items.question: Do we need a facilitator?
items.answer: No. Every activity comes with clear, step-by-step instructions that any team lead can follow. No external facilitator needed.

items.question: Does it work across time zones?
items.answer: Absolutely. Flowkyn supports both live (synchronous) and async activities, making it perfect for globally distributed teams.

items.question: How long do activities take?
items.answer: Activities range from 5-minute icebreakers to 60-minute deep-dive sessions. You can filter by duration to find what fits your schedule.

items.question: Can I track engagement?
items.answer: Yes. Flowkyn provides detailed analytics dashboards showing participation rates, engagement trends, and activity effectiveness over time.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of teams already using Flowkyn to keep their people connected, engaged, and thriving.
cta.noCard: Free for teams up to 10 · No credit card required

footer.description: The team engagement platform for modern distributed teams.

about.title: About Flowkyn
about.intro: Flowkyn is a team engagement platform built for modern distributed teams. We help remote and hybrid organizations strengthen their culture through curated, self-serve team building activities.
about.mission: We believe every team deserves a connected culture — regardless of geography. Our mission is to make team building accessible, affordable, and effective for organizations of all sizes.
about.story: Flowkyn was born out of frustration. We spent hours searching for remote team activities, only to find generic lists or expensive facilitators. We knew there had to be a better way. So we built one — a curated library of activities with clear instructions that any team lead can run themselves.
values: Accessibility — team building shouldn't require a budget or an expert
Inclusivity — activities designed for every time zone and personality type
Simplicity — clear instructions, no complexity, just connection
Measurability — know what works with engagement insights

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.sectionSubtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or just want to say hello? Drop us a message.
contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and organization details when you create an account. We also collect usage data to improve our services.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to provide and improve Flowkyn, communicate with you about your account, and send relevant product updates. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.title: Data Storage & Security
sections.content: Your data is stored on secure, encrypted servers within the European Union. We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also request a full export of your data. Contact us at privacy@flowkyn.com for any requests.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at privacy@flowkyn.com.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using Flowkyn, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

sections.title: Use of Service
sections.content: Flowkyn provides a platform for team engagement activities. You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.

sections.title: Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on Flowkyn, including activity descriptions, designs, and branding, is owned by Flowkyn and protected by copyright law.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Flowkyn is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these terms. You may delete your account at any time through your settings.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Protecting your data is our top priority. Here's how we keep Flowkyn secure.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.description: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Your information is never stored in plain text.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Hosted on enterprise-grade EU infrastructure with automated backups, failover protection, and 99.9% uptime SLA.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: GDPR-compliant by design. We follow data minimization principles and provide full data export and deletion capabilities.

privacy.title: Privacy by Default
privacy.description: No tracking cookies, no data selling, no third-party advertising. Your team's data stays yours.

howItWorks.point3: We’ll debrief what we learned at the end.

preview.body: Each participant receives a private email with their secret role and instructions. When they join, they see a role card that reminds them how to think and speak during the challenge.
preview.hint: This activity is async: people can join from any time zone, share perspectives in their own time, and then debrief together.
preview.hostOnly: Your facilitator is configuring the scenario. You will see your secret role here as soon as the challenge is launched.
preview.configureHint: Use the Configure button to choose industry, crisis, and difficulty before you launch.

techSaaS.label: Tech / SaaS
techSaaS.description: Product launches, outages, roadmap shifts, and high‑growth trade‑offs.

finance.label: Finance
finance.description: Regulation changes, market swings, and risk versus growth decisions.

healthcare.label: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Patient safety, compliance, and capacity planning under pressure.

retail.label: Retail / E‑commerce
retail.description: Campaigns, inventory, and customer experience during peak demand.

manufacturing.label: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Supply chain disruptions, quality issues, and production bottlenecks.

education.label: Education
education.description: Enrollment shifts, stakeholder expectations, and blended‑learning trade‑offs.

marketDisruption.label: Market Disruption
marketDisruption.description: A new competitor launches and threatens your market share. You must respond without overreacting or losing focus.

productLaunchCrisis.label: Product Launch Crisis
productLaunchCrisis.description: Your product launch is in 7 days and everything is going wrong. You must decide what to cut, what to save, and how to communicate.

budgetCuts.label: Budget Cuts
budgetCuts.description: The board demands a 30% cost reduction while maintaining growth targets. Every role feels the impact differently.

teamConflict.label: Team Conflict
teamConflict.description: Critical departments are not communicating and projects are slipping. You must rebuild trust and shared priorities.

easy.label: Easy — clear right answer
easy.hint: Best for a first run or new teams.

medium.label: Medium — multiple solutions
medium.hint: Teams must weigh trade‑offs and align on a path.

hard.label: Hard — high ambiguity
hard.hint: Great for senior teams that want to stress‑test strategy under pressure.

product_lead.name: Product Lead
product_lead.brief: Owns product outcomes, roadmap trade‑offs, and what ships when.
product_lead.secret: You are under pressure to show progress. You want to keep as much of the launch scope as possible — but you know quality and trust are on the line. Push for a small, coherent slice that still tells a strong story.

marketing_lead.name: Marketing Lead
marketing_lead.brief: Owns narrative, launch readiness, and demand generation.
marketing_lead.secret: You already have campaigns booked and stakeholders watching. You need a launch you can stand behind — even if it means shrinking scope — and a clear story for customers if things change.

cfo.name: CFO / Finance Lead
cfo.brief: Owns budget guardrails, runway, and growth targets.
cfo.secret: You care about runway, CAC, and revenue predictability. You are not here to say “no” — you are here to keep the team honest about trade‑offs and to highlight where money is being silently burned.

ops_lead.name: Operations Lead
ops_lead.brief: Owns how plans turn into real delivery across teams.
ops_lead.secret: You see capacity, dependencies, and process friction. Your role is to show what is realistically possible in the next 7 days — and what must change to hit the plan without burning people out.

customer_success_lead.name: Customer Success Lead
customer_success_lead.brief: Owns frontline customer impact and trust.
customer_success_lead.secret: You carry the relationship with existing customers. You will be the first to hear complaints. Push for decisions that protect trust, reduce surprises, and give you honest talking points.

rolesSection.title: Your secret role
rolesSection.subtitle: Check your inbox for full instructions. This card is a quick visual summary.

discussion.title: Async crisis discussion
discussion.subtitle: Share updates, decisions, and trade‑offs in your day‑to‑day tools. Use this space to keep the scenario visible.
discussion.prompt: Your team faces a last‑minute product launch crisis with competing priorities and limited resources.
discussion.promptHint: Each role brings a unique lens. Capture points of tension, decisions, and risks as you go.
discussion.q1: What is the single biggest risk if we do nothing in the next 7 days?
discussion.q2: Where are we mis‑aligned across product, marketing, and operations?
discussion.q3: What trade‑off are you personally willing to own?
discussion.i1: Post updates in your existing tools (Slack, Teams, Notion, etc.).
discussion.i2: Reply in‑thread so conversations stay connected rather than fragmented.
discussion.i3: Capture one decision log you will review together in the debrief.
discussion.hostToolsBody: You can end the async discussion once you feel the team has explored enough perspectives.

rolesMeta.pendingHint: Your facilitator is assigning roles. Stay tuned — your perspective will matter.
rolesMeta.secretHint: Once you know your role, think about what only you can see that others might miss.
rolesMeta.swapBody: During the short swap window, teammates can agree to mentally trade roles if another perspective fits them better. Use chat or your meeting to confirm.
rolesMeta.swapClosed: Role swap window has closed. Keep your current role for the discussion.

debrief.title: Debrief: what did we learn?
debrief.subtitle: Use a retro or leadership session to reflect on how you made decisions, what you missed, and what this means for real work.
debrief.q1: Where did we move too fast, and where did we move too slow?
debrief.q2: Which roles saw risk earliest — and were they heard?
debrief.q3: What would we do differently in a real incident starting tomorrow?
debrief.a1: Capture 2–3 concrete changes you will make to process, communication, or ownership.
debrief.a2: Assign clear owners and deadlines for each action.
debrief.a3: Schedule a follow‑up in 4–6 weeks to review impact.
debrief.summaryBody: Share three bullets: what you simulated, what you learned about how you work under pressure, and what you will change as a result.

twoTruths.name: Two Truths and a Lie
twoTruths.description: Classic icebreaker where each person shares three statements — two truths and one lie. Team guesses which is the lie.

coffeeRoulette.name: Coffee Roulette
coffeeRoulette.description: Random 1:1 pairings for virtual coffee chats. Creates cross-team connections and breaks down silos through personal conversation.

winsOfWeek.description: Weekly Slack/Teams thread where everyone shares one win from their week — work or personal. Builds positive culture and celebrates progress.

strategicEscape.description: An async strategic simulation where your team navigates a realistic crisis scenario from different roles and perspectives.

getting_started.q1: How do I create my account?
getting_started.a1: Sign up with your email address and follow the verification process. You'll be able to create your first organization right away.
getting_started.q2: What's the difference between a team and an organization?
getting_started.a2: An organization is the top-level container where you manage team members and access. Teams are groups within your organization for specific projects or departments.
getting_started.q3: Can I invite people to my organization?
getting_started.a3: Yes! Go to your organization settings and click 'Invite Members'. You can invite team members by email and assign them specific roles.

events.q1: How do I create an event?
events.a1: Navigate to Events and click 'Create New Event'. Fill in the event details, date, and activities you want to include.
events.q2: Can I schedule events in advance?
events.a2: Absolutely! You can create events and schedule them for any future date. We'll send reminders to participants.
events.q3: How do participants join an event?
events.a3: Participants can join through an invite link, or you can send them a direct invitation via email.

activities.q1: What types of activities can I create?
activities.a1: You can create quizzes, surveys, games, scavenger hunts, and many more interactive activities.
activities.a2: Yes! Save activities as templates and reuse them in multiple events. You can customize them each time.
activities.q3: How do I see activity results?
activities.a3: Access the analytics dashboard for any event to see detailed results, participant scores, and engagement metrics.

teams.q1: How many people can I add to my team?
teams.a1: There's no limit! Add as many team members as you need. You can organize them into groups and assign different roles.
teams.q2: What are the different user roles?
teams.a2: We have Admin (full control), Moderator (manage events and participants), and Member (participant only) roles.
teams.q3: Can I manage permissions for team members?
teams.a3: Yes, you can customize permissions based on roles and give specific team members access to certain events or features.

technical.a1: We support all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. For best performance, please keep your browser updated.
technical.q2: Is my data secure on Flowkyn?
technical.a2: Yes! We use industry-standard encryption and security measures. Your data is protected and never shared without your consent.
technical.q3: What should I do if I encounter a bug?
technical.a3: Please use the 'Report an Issue' feature in our support section. Include as much detail as possible, and our team will investigate.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your team today.
dashboard.noActivityDataDesc: Start running team activities to see engagement trends here.

apiErrors.AUTH_ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support.
apiErrors.AUTH_ACCOUNT_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email address before logging in.
apiErrors.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
apiErrors.AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid session. Please log in again.
apiErrors.AUTH_MISSING_TOKEN: You need to log in to access this.
apiErrors.AUTH_EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: No account found with that email address.
apiErrors.AUTH_VERIFICATION_EXPIRED: Verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
apiErrors.AUTH_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
apiErrors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do this.
apiErrors.INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You don't have the required permissions.
apiErrors.NOT_A_MEMBER: You are not a member of this workspace.
apiErrors.SOLE_OWNER: You are the sole owner of an organization. Transfer ownership before deleting your account.
apiErrors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check your input and try again.
apiErrors.INVALID_FORMAT: The format of your input is invalid.
apiErrors.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
apiErrors.CONFLICT: A conflict occurred. The resource may have been modified.
apiErrors.REFERENCED_NOT_FOUND: A referenced resource could not be found.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
apiErrors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file is too large. Please upload a smaller file.
apiErrors.FILE_TYPE_NOT_ALLOWED: This file type is not supported.
apiErrors.EVENT_FULL: This event is already at full capacity.
apiErrors.ALREADY_PARTICIPANT: You are already a participant in this event.
apiErrors.NOT_PARTICIPANT: You are not a participant in this event.
apiErrors.SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE: This session is not currently active.
apiErrors.ROUND_NOT_ACTIVE: This round is not currently active.
apiErrors.TIMEOUT: The request timed out. Please try again.
apiErrors.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
apiErrors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

welcome.title: Welcome to Flowkyn!
welcome.content: Let's take a quick tour to help you get started with engaging your remote team.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.content: Here you can see a high-level overview of your team's engagement, active sessions, and upcoming events.

activities.title: Activities & Games
activities.content: Explore our library of over 50 icebreakers, games, and wellness rituals ready to be launched.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.content: Manage your workspaces, invite team members, and configure permissions here.
